name: BMW G20/G21/G28 3 Series plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: G20 330e uses a turbo four with eDrive; petrol engine oil follows CBS but plug-in use lowers engine km—follow months and the service display.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; regenerative braking changes pad wear but not fluid hygroscopy.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Petrol engine air filter ~60,000 km when combustion mileage accumulates.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Turbo four PHEV: long-life plugs ~90,000 km engine miles.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Regen extends pad life; still inspect per CBS (~50,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.vehicle check: Includes hybrid-specific checks; use a workshop qualified for high-voltage systems.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW PHEV models use a cooled high-voltage battery/e-drive circuit; many EU schedules specify inspection/replacement around 120,000 km—confirm in the HV supplement.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Engine cooling circuit preventive ~120,000 km (separate from HV coolant in some vehicles).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: DI petrol engine may still need intake cleaning at high combustion mileage (~120,000 km).
